name: Ameer Aalam
subject_template: Update on Sameer’s transfer to Microsoft Noida
body_template:
Dear Sir,

I hope you are doing well. I am writing to inform you that Sameer’s internal transfer to the Microsoft Noida office has been successfully completed.

His reporting date at the Noida office is 3rd May. He will be joining the new team from that day and will be taking on additional responsibilities aligned with his skills and performance so far. We are confident that this move will give him strong exposure and good growth opportunities.

If you need any further details from our side, please feel free to let me know.

Best regards,
Harsh Vijay
Team Lead, Microsoft
